values_verified.expected: greyed span if closed, active link if open

limitation: NOTE: This test verifies the current banner state (open or closed) does NOT show '0:00 left' with active link. It does NOT test the live countdown-to-expiry transition (would require waiting at the cutoff boundary). The TDZ fix (PR #255) was verified by the page loading without crash — the previous version crashed with ReferenceError.
